_meta.source: Building listing pages + Zumper + condos.ca + web searches + neighborhood-level inference for wave1/wave2

confidence_levels.high: Confirmed on official listing page or condos.ca amenity list

street_parking_rules.mississauga: Overnight street parking BANNED 2am-6am without permit. Free permits up to 14/year, 5 days each. Proposed monthly $50/yr $500.
street_parking_rules.toronto: Most residential streets require overnight permit ($23-25/mo). Many west-end zones FULL with waitlist.
street_parking_rules.etobicoke_west_mall_markland: Slightly easier than central Toronto but still permit-required for overnight.

fields.parking_pain: Composite: visitor lot availability + street parking ease + overnight permit availability
fields.visitor_parking: what guests can do (lot or street-only with permit hassle)

elora.ev_count_note: EV charging confirmed on Minto listing page
elora.gym_note: Fitness centre with Naomi Cube + yoga studio
elora.street_parking_note: Quiet residential Meadowvale — permits readily available
elora.notes: STRONG amenity stack: EV + pet wash + parcel room + yoga + gym. Minto operator = consistent. Confirmed underground.

battleford_glen_erin.notes: FREE parking is the headline. Surface lot, plenty of space. No EV, no package room (it's a 70s building). InterRent operator concerns.

reid_drive.street_parking_note: Streetsville village — quiet side streets near GO
reid_drive.notes: Cheapest parking ($45) on shortlist. Surface only — winter scraping. Older building, no EV/concierge.

collegeway_2285.notes: Hazelview typical $55-85. Listing says 'ample parking'. Office only Mon-Fri 9-5 = no after-hours help.

miracle_4900.visitor_parking: yes / underground visitor spots (4hr free, longer needs concierge approval)
miracle_4900.ev_count_note: Condo board added EV chargers post-2020 per condos.ca patterns
miracle_4900.notes: Parking INCLUDED in condo maintenance. Visitor parking standard for 2013-build condo. Per-unit variance on EV access.

arc_erin_mills.ev_count_note: Swift Network EV chargers (6.6kW) at parking spots 141 & 142 (confirmed via metroEV)
arc_erin_mills.gym_note: Gym + indoor pool + rec room + party room + guest suites
arc_erin_mills.street_parking_note: Eglinton frontage — street parking unwise but irrelevant given building
arc_erin_mills.notes: PREMIUM amenity stack. 24/7 concierge + EV + visitor parking + guest suites. 2019 build, Daniels.

dialogue.gym_note: Fitness room + outdoor terrace + co-working + games lounge
dialogue.street_parking_note: City Centre — street parking limited but irrelevant
dialogue.notes: BGO institutional. Dog SPA (not just wash) = rare. 24/7 concierge. Highest parking cost on list (~$175 for new BGO build).

lincoln_545.concierge_note: On-site customer service / on-site staff / superintendent
lincoln_545.street_parking_note: Toronto (Etobicoke) — overnight permit required, West Mall has wait but obtainable
lincoln_545.notes: CONFIRMED: $120 underground / $100 outdoor. Older 70s tower. No EV, no gym. Strong staff coverage though.

mill_road_340.street_parking_note: Markland Wood — Toronto overnight permit needed
mill_road_340.notes: Park Property standard pricing inferred. On-site convenience store is unusual perk.

mimico_estates.street_parking_note: Mimico/Lake Shore Toronto — overnight permits OFTEN FULL on adjacent streets; visitors will struggle
mimico_estates.notes: CAPREIT older 1950s-60s low-rise. Surface only. Mimico permit zones notoriously crowded — VISITOR PARKING IS THE PAIN POINT, not your own spot.

walden_circle.gym_note: Pool + fitness + squash + tennis (rare squash court)
walden_circle.notes: Strong amenity stack for the price (squash+tennis+pool). Older complex but spacious site = parking not tight.

lakewood_1257.notes: AVOID-list building. Older, surface only, broken-maintenance reputation suggests parking lot also neglected.

forty_second_45.ev_count_note: Brand-new build, Greenwin spec includes EV-ready
forty_second_45.street_parking_note: Long Branch — Toronto overnight permit needed, Lakeshore zones tight
forty_second_45.notes: New build = modern amenity baseline. Inferred from Greenwin new-build spec; verify exact $.

vita_on_the_lake.ev_count_note: 18 Level 2 EV chargers installed by metroEV + infrastructure for 20 more EV-ready spots (CONFIRMED)
vita_on_the_lake.gym_note: Indoor pool + fitness room + guest suite + party room
vita_on_the_lake.street_parking_note: Humber Bay Shores — Toronto overnight permits FULL with multi-year waitlist on Annie Craig
vita_on_the_lake.notes: STAR amenity stack. Parking included in maintenance. Pet washing station + EV + 24/7 concierge. Per-unit variance — verify your specific listing has parking deeded.

lago_waterfront.visitor_parking: yes / underground visitor garage + car wash
lago_waterfront.ev_count_note: EV infrastructure standard in 2017 Mattamy build
lago_waterfront.gym_note: H2O multi-level fitness + indoor pool + hot tub + sauna + theatre
lago_waterfront.street_parking_note: Same Annie Craig zone as Vita — overnight permits inaccessible
lago_waterfront.notes: ELITE amenities: car wash in garage + pet wash + 24/7 concierge + 2 guest suites + theatre + hot tub. Per-unit verify parking deeded.

eau_du_soleil.visitor_parking: yes / 226 visitor spots + dedicated 236-stall visitor level (CONFIRMED)
eau_du_soleil.ev_count_note: EV charging stations installed in parking spots (CONFIRMED)
eau_du_soleil.gym_note: 40,000 sqft amenity space: fitness centre + indoor saltwater pool + hot tub + theatre + party room
eau_du_soleil.street_parking_note: Shore Breeze — overnight street permit unavailable, but huge visitor garage compensates
eau_du_soleil.notes: BEST visitor parking on entire list: 226+ visitor spots dedicated. EV + 24/7 concierge + guest suites + saltwater pool. Tallest residential west of downtown.

promenade_2301.street_parking_note: Lake Shore Mimico — Toronto permit zones tight; Park Lawn area particularly hard for visitors
promenade_2301.notes: Homestead older purpose-built. Surface only on tight Lake Shore parcel. Visitor parking will be a recurring pain.

landmark_2493.ev_count_note: EV charging stations CONFIRMED on Zumper listing
landmark_2493.street_parking_note: Mimico Lake Shore — visitor street parking nightmare
landmark_2493.notes: RARE: EV charging in older Homestead building. Indoor + outdoor parking options. Homestead corporate complaints — verify in person.

lake_shore_155.street_parking_note: Lake Cres quieter than Lake Shore but still Toronto permit zone
lake_shore_155.notes: Smaller InterRent building on quieter side street. Surface lot is tight. Visitors will use 501 streetcar or park at GO.

shoreline_towers.ev_count_note: EV charging CONFIRMED on Zumper listing — rare for 1960 building
shoreline_towers.notes: Briarlane older twin-tower from 1960. EV is the surprise upside. Garage AND surface options.

park_lawn_285.street_parking_note: Stonegate — Toronto permit zones with availability, easier than Mimico
park_lawn_285.notes: CONFIRMED: surface $125 / garage $175 (high for the rent). 3-storey walkup — small lot.

newholm_8.notes: Same GTA MFP operator as 285 Park Lawn. Surface $125 / garage $175. 4-storey walk-up.

markwood_4365.ev_count_note: New 2024 build — EV-ready standard for Sterling Karamar new spec
markwood_4365.gym_note: Fitness center + yoga + movie theatre + co-working + party room + BBQ courtyard
markwood_4365.street_parking_note: Markland Wood — Toronto permit zone, low demand = easier
markwood_4365.notes: PROMO: 3 months FREE parking on 14-month lease + 6 months free locker. Confirmed dog run. New 2024 build = full modern amenity suite.

station_place_5249.gym_note: Full fitness facility + outdoor infinity pool + community room + kids play area
station_place_5249.street_parking_note: Kipling subway core — heavy daytime traffic but visitor garage solves it
station_place_5249.notes: CONFIRMED on cpliving.com: underground $125, locker $75. 24/7 concierge. Pet run + wash. Best transit base on list.

james_90.street_parking_note: Long Branch — Toronto permit zone, Lakeshore side tight
james_90.notes: Small Greenwin walk-up. Surface only. Small footprint suggests tight lot.

lakeshore_760.notes: Older Lakeview building. Surface lot, low demand area = easy.

applewood_on_park.ev_count_note: QuadReal portfolio standard — EV charging confirmed per data.js promo
applewood_on_park.gym_note: Fitness centre + seasonal outdoor pool + sauna + billiards + ping pong
applewood_on_park.dog_amenities: pet-friendly building, no specific spa/run noted
applewood_on_park.notes: QuadReal corporate = consistent maintenance. EV + pool + sauna unusual for the price point.

sheridan_crossing.gym_note: Open-concept SS kitchen, in-suite W/D — full new-build amenity
sheridan_crossing.notes: PROMO: 6 months FREE parking on 14-mo lease. New build. Starlight operator.

sheridan_manor.notes: Older purpose-built rental. Surface lot. InterRent operator concerns may apply.

embassy_99_agnes.street_parking_note: Cooksville — LRT CONSTRUCTION CHAOS through 2028 disrupts all street parking
embassy_99_agnes.notes: LRT construction will impact parking access through 2028. Pet policy now CONFLICTING.

sherobee_2170.notes: AVOID-list building. Roach reports + unhelpful management suggest neglected lot too.

dixie_square_1750.notes: Eastern Mississauga. Older building, low parking demand.

1011_lorne_park.street_parking_note: Lorne Park upscale residential — easiest street parking on list
1011_lorne_park.notes: Small older building in upscale residential. Plenty of street + surface.
